info.description: Authentication service for the Bank App
info.title: Bank App API

get.description: Returns a paginated list of cities with optional name search

post.description: Creates a new city with the given name

get.description: Returns a city by its UUID

delete.description: Deletes a city by its UUID

get.description: Returns a paginated list of entrepreneurs with optional filters

post.description: Creates a new entrepreneur. If the INN name exists, it binds the existing INN; otherwise creates a new one.

put.description: Updates the birdarcha API access token used by the background syncer

get.description: Returns a paginated list of entrepreneurs that failed to send to SQB

post.description: Fetches all entrepreneurs with sqb_api_error and resends them to SQB. Clears the error on success.
post.summary: Retry sending failed entrepreneurs to SQB

get.description: Returns an entrepreneur by its UUID

delete.description: Deletes an entrepreneur by its UUID

get.description: Returns a paginated list of IFUT codes with optional name search
Returns a paginated list of INNs with optional name search
Returns a paginated list of users with optional filters

post.description: Authenticates user and returns access and refresh tokens
Invalidates all active sessions for the authenticated user
Rotates the refresh token and returns a new token pair
Creates a new user account with the provided details

get.description: Returns a user by their UUID

put.description: Updates a user's full_name, role, or status

delete.description: Deletes a user and all their sessions
